title: Happy Letter
content:
Fly, little note,
    And know no rest
    Till warm you lie
    Within that nest
    Which is her breast;
    Though why to thee
    Such joy should be
    Who carest not,
    While I must wait
    Here desolate,
    I cannot wot.
    O what I 'd do
    To come with you!
meaning:
"Happy Letter" is a quintessential example of Richard Le Gallienne's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
